§ 01 — zuriel erikson valencia joven

biophotonics
× robotics

mechanical engineer specializing in biophotonics & medical robotics — building light-based instruments and steerable tools for medicine.

current: phd student, harvard-mit hst · yun lab, wellman center for photomedicine @ mgh
previous: bs/mse, johns hopkins mechanical engineering · barman lab
